title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions · Skill Brief: Tool Contracts
summary: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext tool contracts increment in an MCP primitive and naming contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.
Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
